action.reasoning: Observation: the latest short DLinear retrain recovered the pipeline and achieved a new best eval mse 0.5069. Analysis: only ~20 seconds remain, while prior training iterations took many minutes, so any further training or architectural change is infeasible and risks ending without a valid final submission. Decision: stop now and preserve the current best checkpoint/predict pipeline as the final result.
action.done_reason: Time budget is nearly exhausted and the current checkpoint already achieved the best observed mse (0.5069); further iterations are too risky relative to remaining time.
